info.title: Butchapro API
info.description:
**This documentation includes both web and API routes.**

- **Mobile / API clients:** Only paths under `/api/v1/*` are intended for programmatic access. Use `Authorization: Bearer <token>` with a token from `POST /api/v1/auth/login`. Responses are JSON with envelope `{ "success": true|false, "message": string, "data": object }` (or `errors` on failure). Paginated lists nest Laravel’s paginator inside `data`.

- **Web routes:** Operations tagged **Web Routes** use Laravel **session** authentication (browser cookies), often return **HTML** or **redirects**, and are **not** substitutes for the mobile API.

**Filtering:** In Swagger UI, filter by tag **Mobile API** to see only Bearer JSON endpoints.

**Future REST:** Additional verbs (`GET/PATCH/DELETE` on resource IDs) may be added under `/api/v1` without changing the envelope contract.

servers.description: Application root (e.g. https://buchapro.com/). Paths are absolute from this origin. Do NOT set the server to `/api` or `/api/v1` — paths already include `/api/v1/...`.

get.description: Public metadata and link to Swagger UI (`documentation` URL). No authentication.

200.description: Standard envelope; `data` includes name, version, documentation.

post.description: Validates user email/password, creates a row in `mobile_api_tokens` (hashed token), returns plain token once.

200.description: Token issued inside standard envelope (see LoginResponse).

401.description: Invalid email or password (`success: false`, `message` describes failure).

422.description: Request body validation failure (e.g. missing email or password).

post.description: Creates a user, assigns tenant owner role, creates a starter business (same rules as web registration). Returns Bearer token — no session cookie. Rate limited.

201.description: Account created; token issued (see LoginResponse shape).

post.description: Same payload rules as web `StoreBusinessRequest`. User must own the account (creates under their user). Stateless JSON — no CSRF.

schema.description: Matches `StoreBusinessRequest`: business_name, registration_number, contact_phone, email, status, owner_first_name, owner_last_name, optional type, location fields, optional members[].

get.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Optional query `business_id` to resolve `userRole` / `business_type` for that workspace. In Swagger UI: click **Authorize**, enter the plain token from `POST /api/v1/auth/login` (the UI sends the Bearer prefix automatically).

parameters.name: business_id
parameters.description: Optional: resolve role/type for this business (must be accessible).

200.description: User profile and accessible businesses inside standard envelope.

get.summary: Facilities, inspectors, species, status enums for mobile forms

200.description: Nested lookup payload in `data` (facilities, inspectors, species, statuses).

get.summary: Paginated animal intakes for accessible facilities

200.description: Laravel length-aware paginator fields inside `data` (including `data` array of rows).

post.description: Facility must belong to the user's accessible businesses. See also StoreAnimalIntakeRequest for extended web validation (species enum, optional supplier/division/health cert fields).

Uses StoreSlaughterPlanRequest rules: slaughter_date >= today; animal_intake must belong to facility; species must match intake and exist in `species`; inspector must belong to facility; intake health certificate not expired; number_of_animals_scheduled ≤ remaining animals on intake.

post.summary: Create ante-mortem inspection with checklist observations

get.description: Resolves `certificate_qrs.slug` → certificate with batch, slaughter execution, plan, animal intake origin chain, facility, inspector. **Response is HTML** (Blade), not JSON. No authentication. Tags list the domain areas surfaced on this page.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Public slug from certificate QR record

200.description: HTML page with certificate, batch, origin, facility context.

get.description: Aggregates system issues for the signed-in processor user: expired facility licenses, inspector authorizations, over capacity, missing inspections, transport gaps, temperature issues, etc. **Requires Laravel web session** (not Bearer). Route lives outside `/api/v1`.

post.description: Creates a tenant business through the web workspace. This is a Laravel web route and requires an authenticated browser session, not Bearer token auth. On success the controller redirects to `businesses.hub`.

302.description: Redirect response. On success it goes to the business hub; unauthenticated users are redirected to login.

get.description: Returns the facilities index page for a business. This is an HTML web route, not a JSON API endpoint. Requires an authenticated browser session and the business must belong to the signed-in user.

parameters.name: business
parameters.description: Business ID whose facilities should be listed

200.description: HTML facilities index page for the specified business.

404.description: Business not found or not owned by the signed-in user.

post.description: Creates a facility under the specified business through the web workspace. Requires an authenticated browser session and the business must belong to the signed-in user. On success the controller redirects to the business facilities index.

parameters.name: business
parameters.description: Business ID that owns the facility

302.description: Facility created; redirects to the business facilities list.

404.description: Business not found or not owned by the signed-in user.

post.description: Creates an inspector for a facility available to the signed-in user. This is a Laravel web route and requires an authenticated browser session. On success the controller redirects to `inspectors.hub`.

302.description: Inspector created; redirects to inspectors hub.

404.description: Facility not found or not accessible to the signed-in user.

AnimalHealthRecord.description: Farmer-side health observation log. FK: farm_id, livestock_id.

AnimalIntake.description: Animal origin / intake before slaughter. FK: facility_id. Optional supply_request_id, farm_id, contract_id.

AnimalIntakeCreateRequest.description: Mobile create body. Web UI supports additional optional fields (divisions, supplier_id, health cert dates) via StoreAnimalIntakeRequest.

AnteMortemCreateRequest.description: observations must include every checklist item for the species; approved+rejected ≤ number_examined.

observations.description: Keyed by checklist item id; each value: { "value": string (allowed per AnteMortemChecklist), "notes": string|null }

ApiError.description: Standard error envelope (validation or business rule failure).

errors.description: Laravel-style field bag or arbitrary JSON object

ApiSuccess.description: Standard success envelope (target contract for new and updated endpoints).

Batch.description: Batch of product from a slaughter execution. FK: slaughter_execution_id, inspector_id (required).

Business.description: Tenant business (farmer, processor, or logistics). FK: user_id (owner linkage).

Certificate.description: Inspection certificate. batch_id may be nullable in edge data; normally links to batch. FK: inspector_id, facility_id.

batch_id.description: Nullable in DB; usually set when issued from a batch.

DeliveryConfirmation.description: Confirms receipt for a transport trip. FK: transport_trip_id.

Facility.description: Facility under a business (slaughterhouse, butchery, storage, …). FK: business_id.

Inspector.description: Inspector attached to a single facility. FK: facility_id.

Livestock.description: Farmer herd animal record. FK: farm_id.

business_id.description: Optional workspace context; must be in the user's accessible businesses.

PostMortemCreateRequest.description: approved+condemned ≤ total_examined; observations must cover PostMortemChecklist for species; abnormal critical items can force result rejected.

observations.description: Keyed by checklist item id; each value: { "value", "notes" } per PostMortemChecklist.

SlaughterExecution.description: Recorded slaughter event for a plan. FK: slaughter_plan_id.

SlaughterPlan.description: Slaughter session plan. FK: facility_id, animal_intake_id, inspector_id.

SlaughterPlanCreateRequest.description: Aligned with StoreSlaughterPlanRequest: slaughter_date after_or_equal today; inspector must exist and belong to facility_id; species must match active species name; animal_intake must match facility, species, non-expired health cert, and scheduled count ≤ remaining animals on intake.

TransportTrip.description: Transport movement. FK: certificate_id, origin_facility_id, destination_facility_id required; batch_id nullable.

batch_id.description: Optional link to batch when applicable.

User.description: Application user (tenant membership via business_users / roles).

userRole.description: Membership: owner, manager, staff, super_admin, or user

WarehouseStorage.description: Storage of certified product. FK: batch_id, certificate_id (domain rule); warehouse_facility_id, cold_room_id optional per flow.

bearerAuth.description: **Opaque API token** (not JWT). Obtain with `POST /api/v1/auth/login`; send once in the response `data.token`, then `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Stored hashed as SHA-256 in `mobile_api_tokens.token_hash`. Expires per `expires_at` on the token row.

tags.name: Mobile API
tags.description: **JSON API for mobile and integrations** — routes under `/api/v1/*`. Authenticate with `Authorization: Bearer` (opaque token from login).

tags.name: Web Routes
tags.description: **Browser session routes** — HTML or redirects; requires signed-in web user, not the mobile Bearer token.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Mobile API login and token lifecycle (`mobile_api_tokens`).

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Authenticated user profile for the mobile token (`/auth/me`).

tags.name: Businesses
tags.description: Tenant businesses (processor/farmer/logistics). Managed in the web workspace; see **Business** schema for persisted fields and ownership.

tags.name: Facilities
tags.description: Plants, slaughterhouses, storage sites. FK: `business_id`. License and capacity drive compliance checks.

tags.name: Inspectors
tags.description: Inspectors are scoped to a **facility** (`facility_id` required). Referenced by slaughter plans, batches, certificates.

tags.name: Animal Intakes
tags.description: Animal origin records before slaughter. Mobile: `GET/POST /api/v1/animal-intakes`. Full web create rules: `StoreAnimalIntakeRequest`.

tags.name: Slaughter Plans
tags.description: Plans link **facility**, **animal_intake**, **inspector**, species, and counts. Web validation (`StoreSlaughterPlanRequest`): intake must match facility; species must match intake; scheduled headcount ≤ remaining animals on intake; health certificate must not be expired; inspector must belong to facility; species must exist in `species` table.

tags.name: Slaughter Executions
tags.description: Actual slaughter events for a plan. FK: `slaughter_plan_id`.

tags.name: Batches
tags.description: Carcass/batch grouping after slaughter. FK: `slaughter_execution_id`, `inspector_id` (both required in domain model).

tags.name: Ante Mortem Inspections
tags.description: Pre-slaughter inspection with species-specific checklist (`AnteMortemChecklist`). Mobile: `POST /api/v1/ante-mortem-inspections`.

tags.name: Post Mortem Inspections
tags.description: Post-slaughter inspection and disposition. Mobile: `POST /api/v1/post-mortem-inspections`. FK: `batch_id`, `inspector_id`.

tags.name: Certificates
tags.description: Legal certificates. FK: `batch_id` nullable in storage edge cases; usually set. `inspector_id`, `facility_id` required for issuance.

tags.name: Warehouse Storage
tags.description: Cold storage rows. FK: `batch_id`, `certificate_id` required for traceability chain.

tags.name: Transport Trips
tags.description: Movement of product. FK: `certificate_id`, `origin_facility_id`, `destination_facility_id` required; `batch_id` nullable.

tags.name: Delivery Confirmations
tags.description: Receiving confirmation for a transport trip. FK: `transport_trip_id`, etc.

tags.name: Compliance
tags.description: Compliance dashboard aggregates facility/inspector/certificate/transport issues (expired licenses, missing inspections, capacity, etc.). **Implemented as HTML** at `GET /compliance` (session auth), not Bearer.

tags.name: Traceability (public)
tags.description: Public QR trace page: `GET /trace/{slug}` — no authentication.

tags.name: Livestock
tags.description: Farmer herd animals (`livestock` table, FK `farm_id`). Referenced alongside intakes and supply workflows.

tags.name: AnimalHealthRecord
tags.description: Farmer observation logs (`animal_health_records`); distinct from processor animal intakes.
